match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Studio Vanity Introduction",
    "storyBeat": "Introduce product and protagonist in serene studio setting",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, serene, effortlessly cool, clean and breathable morning mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",
    "storyBeat": "Show effortless movement and beach environment",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal morning mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_003",
    "title": "Lipstick Application Close-Up",
    "storyBeat": "Product application detail shot",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - VANITY - CLOSE",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Clean serene minimal fresh sensory"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_004",
    "title": "Shoreline Entry",
    "storyBeat": "Sensory connection to water",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - DAY",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal moment with golden warmth"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_005",
    "title": "Sand Product Flat-Lay",
    "storyBeat": "Product hero shot in natural setting",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SAND - OVERHEAD",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "Effortless breezy coastal mood, sensory and fresh."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_006",
    "title": "Waterline Interaction",
    "storyBeat": "Dynamic product-in-action moment",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - WATERLINE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "fresh sensory and effortlessly cool coastal moment"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_007",
    "title": "Bathroom Shelf Macro",
    "storyBeat": "Clean product still life",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - BATHROOM SHELF - LATER",
    "timeOfDay": "day",
    "visualSummary": "Clean, serene, minimal with immediate real-light feel"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_008",
    "title": "Bench Application",
    "storyBeat": "Intimate reflective moment",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - PROMENADE BENCH - GOLDEN HOUR",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Intimate reflective and effortlessly breezy coastal mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_009",
    "title": "Final Cinematic Shot",
    "storyBeat": "Closing emotional and brand payoff",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL WAVE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool, emotional brand payoff"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
